version_description: Brilliant pop song from Daryl here. Please follow the record to understand the pace of these changes as there are many passing chords and nuances. Chorus plays as first part of intro. Refrain and bridges play as second part of intro. Outro plays as chorus repeating to a quick fade.

versions.version_description: Added lyrics, chord changes where they occur.
This is simplified for keyboard and/or piano drawn from the live version of the song as played live on Daryls House.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
As heard on the original album: https://youtu.be/AuvInlFGp8A?si=WyTpIAYSAhGPslhO


Chord Voicings:

Ebmaj7: X65333
Dm7: X57565
Cm7: X35343
C7sus2: X35333
Bb/F: 113331
F: XX3211
Fsus2: XX3011
Gm7: 353333
Bb: X13331
F/Bb: X13211
Bb6: X13333
Eb/Bb: 66888X
Eb/F: X8888X

G7sus4: 353533
C7sus4: X33363
Gm7/D: X53333
Eb: X65343
F6: XX3231
F/Eb: XX1211
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]*: XX1333
Bb/Eb: X68766[/tab]
Fsus2*: X 8 10 10 8 8



[Intro]
[ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]C7sus2[/ch]  [ch]Bb/F[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
[ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Dm7[/ch] [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]C7sus2[/ch]  [ch]Bb/F[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch]

[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F/Bb[/ch] [ch]Bb6[/ch] [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch] [ch]Eb/F[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]F/Bb[/ch] [ch]Ebmaj7/Bb[/ch] [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]
 Midnight hour,  almost  over[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F/Bb[/ch]    [ch]G7sus4[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
 Time is running out for the magic pair[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]F/Bb[/ch]    [ch]Ebmaj7/Bb[/ch]        [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]
 I know you gave,  the best that you have[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]            [ch]F/Bb[/ch]            [ch]G7sus4[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
 But one more chance couldn't be all that hard to bear[/tab]


[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
 Wait for me please[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]C7sus2[/ch]                 [ch]Bb/F[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
 Wait for me, al-right, I guess that's more than I should ask, but won't you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]C7sus2[/ch]            [ch]Bb/F[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
Wait for me,          please wait for me,  al-though I know the light is fading fast[/tab]
          (Wait for me,        wait for me)


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]         [ch]F/Bb[/ch]      [ch]Ebmaj7/Bb[/ch]       [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]
 You could go either way, is it easi-er to stay[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]F/Bb[/ch]           [ch]G7sus4[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
 I wonder what you'll do when your chance rolls a-round[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]F/Bb[/ch]          [ch]Ebmaj7/Bb[/ch] [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]
 But you gotta know how much I want to keep you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]F/Bb[/ch]      [ch]G7sus4[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
 When I'm a-way I'm a-fraid it will all fall down[/tab]


[Chorus 2]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
 So wait for me please[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]C7sus2[/ch]                 [ch]Bb/F[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
 Wait for me, al-right, I guess that's more than I should ask, but won't you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]C7sus2[/ch]            [ch]Bb/F[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]F6[/ch]
Wait for me,          please wait for me,  al-though I know the light is fading fast[/tab]
          (Wait for me,        wait for me)


[Refrain]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]F/Bb[/ch]        [ch]Bb6[/ch]         [ch]C7sus4[/ch] [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
 La la la la la la la la la la la la     la[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]F/Eb[/ch]        [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]*     [ch]Bb/F[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
 La la la la la la la la la la la la   la[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]F/Bb[/ch]        [ch]Bb6[/ch]         [ch]C7sus4[/ch] [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
 La la la la la la la la la la la la     la[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]F/Eb[/ch]        [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]*     [ch]Bb/F[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
 La la la la la la la la la la la la   la[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]F/Bb[/ch]             [ch]Bb6[/ch]           [ch]C7sus4[/ch] [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
 Love is what it does and ours is doing noth - ing[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]           [ch]F/Eb[/ch]              [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]*          [ch]Bb/F[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
 But all the time we spent, it must be good for some - thing[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]F/Bb[/ch]             [ch]Bb6[/ch]               [ch]C7sus4[/ch] [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
 Please for-give all the dis-turbance I'm cre -at -   ing, but[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]F/Eb[/ch]                [ch]Bb/Eb[/ch]              [ch]Eb/F[/ch]    [ch]Fsus2[/ch]*
 You got a lot to learn if you think that I'm not waiting for you[/tab]


[Chorus 3]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
 So wait for me please[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]C7sus2[/ch]                 [ch]Bb/F[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
 Wait for me, oh I, I guess that's more than I should ask, so won't you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]C7sus2[/ch]            [ch]Bb/F[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]F6[/ch]
Wait for me,          please wait for me,  oh God, I know the light is fading fast, yes it is[/tab]
          (Wait for me,        wait for me)


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]F/Bb[/ch]        [ch]Bb6[/ch]         [ch]C7sus4[/ch] [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
 La-la-la-la-la-la-la-la-la-la-la-la  -  dy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]F/Eb[/ch]                [ch]Bb/Eb[/ch]              [ch]Eb/F[/ch]    [ch]Fsus2[/ch]*
 You got a lot to learn if you think that I'm not waiting for you[/tab]


[Chorus 4]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
 So wait for me please[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]C7sus2[/ch]                 [ch]Bb/F[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
 Wait for me, oh I, I guess that's more than I should ask, so won't you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]   [ch]Cm7[/ch]    [ch]C7sus2[/ch]            [ch]Bb/F[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]F6[/ch]
Wait for me,          please wait for me,  oh God, I know the light is fading fast, yes it is[/tab]
          (Wait for me,        wait for me)


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]F/Bb[/ch]        [ch]Bb6[/ch]         [ch]C7sus4[/ch] [ch]Gm7/D[/ch]
 La-la-la-la-la-la-la-la-la-la-la-la  -  dy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]         [ch]F/Eb[/ch]                [ch]Eb/Bb[/ch]              [ch]Eb/F[/ch]    [ch]Fsus2[/ch]*
 You got a lot to learn if you think that I'm not waiting for you[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]
 Wait for me please[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm7[/ch]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]C7sus2[/ch]                 [ch]Bb/F[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
 Wait for me, al-right, I guess that's more than I should ask[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Fsus2[/ch]     [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]             [ch]Dm7[/ch]  [ch]Cm7[/ch] [ch]C7sus2[/ch]  [ch]Bb/F[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
So won't you wait, so won't you wait[/tab]
